title: nephrodium edentulum
intro: Nephrodium edentulum, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. Traditionally, Nephrodium edentulum has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties. In herbal preparations, Nephrodium edentulum is often dried and used in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
